MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Bruce C. Burge, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Devendra Patel and Defendant Ronald E. Johnson appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
